result.summary: Added NxCode and TIMEWELL as fresh publisher-contact targets, regenerated the primary-repo-flat discovery artifact, refreshed the canonical publisher packet, and rewrote the execution board/lane snapshot so the scheduled post-hold run sees truthful fresh reserve targets.

verification.distribution_lane_reason: The post-cooldown StackOverflow slot already burned without a fresh outcome, and the other external lanes are still in-flight; hold for a genuinely different executable window instead of rerunning the same demand-capture search.
